action.description: May AP release payment after a vendor bank-account update?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a vendor bank-account update?
context.anomaly_observed: A vendor-master update exists, but payment execution requires separate release authority and callback provenance.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-MAR-041 releases USD 126000 to Marlo Components account ending 8821 on 2026-06-24.
Vendor-master approval VM-MAR-041 approves Marlo Components account ending 8821 before 2026-06-24.
Callback CALL-MAR-041 used the pre-change vendor-master phone source and confirmed account ending 8821 for Marlo Components.
Payment-release worksheet REL-MAR-041 is prepared for Marlo Components, USD 126000, account ending 8821, release date 2026-06-24; approver field remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Payment after bank-account update is complete only when vendor-master approval matches vendor and account, independent callback uses a pre-change trusted source and confirms the account, and payment-release authority matches vendor, account, amount, and release date before payment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
